svg.text: McCzarny recently updated his McCzarny
repository by enhancing the README with
distinct colors for contribution badges and new
project badges for Qt, Chromium, and Boost. He
also refined the README generation workflow,
ignoring HTML files for language statistics,
removing push events to fix errors, and
updating the metrics action. In crater-js, he
implemented significant game mechanics
including stamina for abilities like
teleportation and climbing, and improved
inventory updates and character switching. New
features for crater-js include adding tooltips
to character portraits and items, implementing
ladder functionality, and a trading UI. He also
added various gameplay elements such as item
drops, essence pickups, cave generation, and
refined character movement and animations. A
major update to crater-js involved migrating
the project to TypeScript, followed by cleanup.
He pushed several commits to crater-js to
improve mining actions, handle character
health, stamina, and patience, and show
abilities progress. For chromium-daily-digest,
McCzarny refined HTML utility functions for
rendering overview text, correctly handling
markdown links and code snippets. He also
increased the time between normal and OTOC jobs
in chromium-daily-digest due to potential long
execution times. Finally, he performed
maintenance in flexible-log-analyzer and
upload-image by bumping VS Code versions and
updating various dependencies.
Generated on: Sun Apr 26 03:30:22 2026
